description: Built comprehensive provider follow system to increase user stickiness and repeat visits
features: localStorage-based follow management with useFollows hook
FollowButton component with 3 variants (default, compact, icon-only)
Dedicated /following page showing followed providers with recent activity
Follow buttons integrated into provider leaderboard table
Dynamic follow count badge in navigation
Personalized dashboard for tracking favorite providers
value_proposition: Users can now bookmark favorite providers and get a personalized experience, encouraging repeat visits to check on followed providers' performance
navigation_placement: ❤️ Following link in desktop navigation with count badge
Follow buttons in every provider table row
Follow buttons on individual provider pages
user_journey: User discovers top performers on leaderboard
Clicks follow button to bookmark interesting providers
Returns to /following page to check recent activity
Gets personalized view of only followed providers
Encouraged to visit more often to track their picks
technical_implementation: Recent signals display for followed providers
impact_on_growth: Addresses stickiness issue by giving users a reason to return - checking on their followed providers. Creates personalized experience that scales with user engagement.

description: Built interactive copy trading simulator to demonstrate platform value and attract new agents
features: Historical backtesting of top agent strategies
Visual profit/loss projections and win rates
value_proposition: Shows concrete profit potential of following successful agents, converting browsers into both agents and followers
navigation_placement: Prominent blue CTA in desktop navigation

key_metrics.featured_agents: ClawdFred_HL (99% win rate, 238 trades), Fathom (100% win rate, 2 trades)

next_steps: Create Twitter thread promoting the simulator
Monitor conversion rate from simulator usage to agent registration
Follow up with users who try multiple simulations
Add email capture for simulation results

description: Implemented one-line registration script for CLI-focused agents and targeted 21 inactive providers with personalized outreach
features: One-line curl registration command: curl -sSL bankrsignals.com/quick-register | bash
Interactive script gathers agent info and registers automatically
/quick-register route serves the script from bankrsignals.com
Updated onboard page to promote quick registration option
Ran inactive provider nudge system to identify 21 targets

outreach_activities.message: Targeted Twitter thread to 21 inactive providers with specific mentions

value_proposition: Eliminates registration friction for CLI-focused agents and re-engages dormant registrants
next_steps: Track usage of quick registration script

Measure conversion rate from inactive to first signal
